scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:api && npm run typecheck:admin && npm run typecheck:app-web
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:admin && npm run build:app-web
scripts.verify:backend: npm run test:api && npm run typecheck:api && npm run build:api
scripts.verify: npm run verify:backend && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run typecheck
